Architectures</font></span></div><div><ul><li><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 13px;">Value-based</font></li><li><font face="Verdana" style="font-size: face="Verdana">5.1 Datasets for Multi-Degradation IR</font><div><ul><li style="text-align: left;"><font style="font-size: 13px;" face="Verdana">Synthetic datasets</font></li><li style="text-align: Gap</font></li><li><font style="font-size: 13px;" face="Verdana">Multi-Objective Trade-offs</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="200" x="220" y="390" as="geometry" />
